name: responses-text-input
description: Create response with a simple text input string (oneOf InputParam: string branch)
json: {"model":"gpt-5.6","input":"Write a short bedtime story about a unicorn."}

name: responses-array-input
description: Create response with array input (oneOf InputParam: array branch) and reasoning config
json: {"model":"gpt-5.6","reasoning":{"effort":"low"},"input":[{"role":"user","content":[{"type":"input_text","text":"Write a short bedtime story about a unicorn."}]}]}

name: model-ids-shared-string
description: ModelIdsShared is anyOf string alias; should round-trip a plain model string

name: model-ids-responses-string
description: ModelIdsResponses is anyOf over ModelIdsShared + enum; round-trip a known model ID

name: conversation-param-text
description: ConversationParam as a string conversation ID (oneOf branch)

name: service-tier-string
description: ServiceTier anyOf; round-trip a known tier value

name: reasoning-effort-string
description: ReasoningEffort anyOf; round-trip a known effort value

name: response-stream-options-bool
description: ResponseStreamOptions anyOf; round-trip a boolean value

name: store-boolean
description: CreateResponse with store=true to exercise optional boolean property

name: temperature-double
description: CreateResponse with temperature=0.7 to exercise optional double property

name: input-param-string
description: InputParam as a plain string (oneOf: string branch)

name: input-param-array
description: InputParam as an array of InputItems (oneOf: array branch)

name: responses-full
description: Full CreateResponse with many optional fields
